overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded warrior in ancient Egyptian armor exploring a historic city at night. The character traverses narrow torch-lit streets, open plazas with towering obelisks, interior courtyards, and ascends a long stone staircase between high walls, with warm firelight contrasting against the deep blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential street with stone buildings and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow stone streets, passing wooden doorways and small market stalls illuminated by wall torches

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with red base and white upper walls featuring decorative trim
burning torch mounted on the building wall providing warm orange light
arched wooden doorway with stone frame
wooden table with cloth covering displaying goods

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed street lined with historic stone buildings. Wall-mounted torches cast warm flickering light on the paved ground, while wooden doorways and small market stalls line the path. The sky is partially visible above the rooftops.

events.description: exits narrow street into open plaza with tall illuminated obelisks visible against night sky
turns right to follow the street along the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: emerging into an open plaza with towering obelisks, then turning right to follow the street

entered.detail: tall stone monuments with glowing lights at the top rising against the night sky
palm trees visible in the distance beyond the plaza
large wooden doorway with stone frame leading to interior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by tall illuminated obelisks against the dark blue night sky. The character turns right along the plaza edge, passing stone buildings with columns, and approaches a large doorway leading to an interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with garden transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: passes through doorway into interior courtyard with fire braziers and garden
exits courtyard into covered walkway with wooden beam ceiling

agents.ego_description: entering a courtyard through a large doorway, walking past fire braziers and benches, then proceeding through a covered wooden-beam alleyway

entered.detail: enclosed courtyard with stone paving, plants, and seating areas
large metal bowls with burning fires providing illumination
overhead wooden pergola structure casting striped shadows
stacks of sacks stored against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters an interior courtyard through a grand doorway, passing fire braziers and stone benches in a garden setting. The scene transitions into a covered walkway with a wooden beam ceiling and storage sacks lining the walls, creating a more enclosed and sheltered atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone staircase between high walls

events.description: begins ascending long stone staircase flanked by high walls

agents.ego_description: climbing a long stone staircase flanked by high walls, illuminated by regularly spaced wall torches

entered.detail: long flight of stone steps ascending between walls
high stone block walls rising on both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins a steady ascent up a long stone staircase enclosed by tall stone walls on both sides. Wall-mounted torches provide the only illumination, casting dramatic shadows on the stone steps as the character climbs upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated narrow passage between stone walls

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters narrow elevated passage
passes close to an NPC walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow elevated stone passage, passing an NPC near a doorway

notable_agents.action: walking past the character in the opposite direction through the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall stone walls of the elevated corridor creating a narrow passage
buildings visible at the end of the corridor in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character proceeds through a narrow elevated stone corridor between high walls. An NPC walks past in the opposite direction near a wooden doorway, while distant buildings are visible at the far end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit Egyptian city that transitions from narrow streets and open plazas into enclosed corridors and elevated walkways. It begins by following the character through a cramped street lined with stone buildings and market stalls, where flickering wall torches illuminate the paved ground. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wide plaza dominated by towering illuminated obelisks under a deep blue night sky before the camera turns right and passes through a grand doorway. The movement then shifts into a sheltered interior courtyard with fire braziers and a wooden-beamed walkway, which leads directly to a steady ascent up a long stone staircase enclosed by high walls. Finally, the character reaches the top of the stairs and proceeds through a narrow elevated corridor, passing a local resident near a wooden door as distant buildings appear at the far end of the passage.
